Links: [{"title":"20+ CSS Card Layouts: Free Code Snippets & Examples","url":"https://freefrontend.com/css-card-layouts/"},{"title":"Grid View Switcher For Bootstrap Layout System - grid-view.js | Free jQuery Plugins","url":"https://www.jqueryscript.net/layout/grid-view-switcher-bootstrap.html"},{"title":"Card Grid Pattern | UX Patterns for Developers","url":"https://uxpatterns.dev/patterns/data-display/card-grid"},{"title":"Expanding Grid Cards with View Transitions – Chris Coyier","url":"https://chriscoyier.net/2023/04/11/expanding-grid-cards-with-view-transitions/"},{"title":"Grid / List Toggle Switch – CodeMyUI","url":"https://codemyui.com/grid-list-toggle-switch/"},{"title":"Solving Problems With CSS Grid and Flexbox: The Card UI | Envato Tuts+","url":"https://webdesign.tutsplus.com/solving-problems-with-css-grid-and-flexbox-the-card-ui--cms-27468t"},{"title":"Responsive Card Layout with CSS Grid: A Step-by-Step Guide - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/m97chahboun/responsive-card-layout-with-css-grid-a-step-by-step-guide-3ej1"},{"title":"How to Create a Card Layout Using CSS Grid Layout","url":"https://wpengine.com/resources/card-layout-css-grid-layout-how-to/"},{"title":"Responsive Card Layout with CSS Grid - CodeSandbox","url":"https://codesandbox.io/s/responsive-card-layout-with-css-grid-rpfdn"}]

I've completed the web search for your query about card grid density toggle patterns. Here are the key results:

The search found several relevant resources about card grid layouts and view switchers:

1. **CSS Card Layouts** - CSS card layouts organize complex, high-density digital content into compact, modular containers, establishing fluid visual structures across editorial blogs and e-commerce listings.

2. **Grid View Switcher** - A grid view switcher for Bootstrap allows visitors to quickly switch between Compact View (4x3) and Spaced View (3x3) in Bootstrap powered grid layouts.

3. **UX Patterns** - Card grid controls include density, columns, and responsive behavior. The patterns guide emphasizes intentionally designing density levels for different contexts.

4. **Grid/List Toggle Switches** - There are responsive grid/list toggle switch designs that provide a card UI-inspired way to switch between different viewing modes.

5. **Dynamic Grid Spacing** - Dynamic grid-spacing configurations are engineered using CSS Grid with repeat(auto-fit, minmax()) structures, preventing visual overlap without breaking column flow.

These resources provide practical implementations and design patterns for creating view density toggles between compact, comfortable, and spacious card grid layouts.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
